title: The Shawshank Redemption
plot: A banker convicted of uxoricide forms a friendship with a fellow prisoner as they find redemption through acts of common decency over two decades.

title: The Godfather
plot: The aging patriarch of an organized crime dynasty transfers control of his clandestine empire to his reluctant youngest son.

title: The Dark Knight
plot: When the menace known as the Joker wreaks havoc on Gotham, Batman must accept one of the greatest psychological and physical tests.

title: Pulp Fiction
plot: The lives of two mob hitmen, a boxer, a gangster and his wife intertwine in four tales of violence and redemption.

title: Inception
plot: A thief who steals corporate secrets through dream-sharing technology is given the inverse task of planting an idea into the mind of a C.E.O.

title: Fight Club
plot: An insomniac office worker and a devil-may-care soap maker form an underground fight club that evolves into much more.

title: Forrest Gump
plot: The presidencies of Kennedy and Johnson, the Vietnam War, the Watergate scandal and other historical events unfold from the perspective of an Alabama man.

title: The Matrix
plot: When a beautiful stranger leads computer hacker Neo to a forbidding underworld, he discovers the shocking truth about the life he knows.

title: Goodfellas
plot: The story of Henry Hill and his life in the mob, covering his relationship with his wife Karen Hill and his mob partners.

title: Interstellar
plot: A team of explorers travel through a wormhole in space in an attempt to ensure humanity's survival.

title: Schindler's List
plot: In German-occupied Poland during World War II, industrialist Oskar Schindler gradually becomes concerned for his Jewish workforce.

title: The Silence of the Lambs
plot: A young F.B.I. cadet must receive the help of an incarcerated and manipulative cannibal killer to help catch another serial killer.

title: Saving Private Ryan
plot: Following the Normandy Landings, a group of U.S. soldiers go behind enemy lines to retrieve a paratrooper whose brothers have been killed in action.

title: The Lord of the Rings: The Return of the King
plot: Gandalf and Aragorn lead the World of Men against Sauron's army to draw his gaze from Frodo and Sam as they approach Mount Doom.

title: 12 Angry Men
plot: The jury in a New York City murder trial is frustrated by a single member whose skeptical caution forces them to more carefully consider the evidence.

title: Gladiator
plot: A former Roman General sets out to exact vengeance against the corrupt emperor who murdered his family and sent him into slavery.

title: Spirited Away
plot: During her family's move to the suburbs, a sullen 10-year-old girl wanders into a world ruled by gods, witches, and spirits.

title: The Green Mile
plot: The lives of guards on Death Row are affected by one of their charges: a black man accused of child murder and rape.

title: Parasite
plot: Greed and class discrimination threaten the newly formed symbiotic relationship between the wealthy Park family and the destitute Kim clan.

title: City of God
plot: In the slums of Rio, two kids' paths diverge as one struggles to become a photographer and the other a drug dealer.

title: The Prestige
plot: After a tragic accident, two stage magicians in 1890s London engage in a battle to create the ultimate illusion while sacrificing everything.

title: Whiplash
plot: A promising young drummer enrolls at a cut-throat music conservatory where his dreams of greatness are mentored by an instructor who will stop at nothing.

title: The Departed
plot: An undercover cop and a mole try to identify each other while infiltrating an Irish gang in South Boston.

title: Django Unchained
plot: With the help of a German bounty hunter, a freed slave sets out to rescue his wife from a brutal plantation owner in Mississippi.

title: The Godfather: Part II
plot: The early life and career of Vito Corleone in 1920s New York is portrayed while his son, Michael, expands and tightens his grip on the family crime syndicate.

title: Rear Window
plot: A photographer in a wheelchair spies on his neighbors from his Greenwich Village apartment window, and becomes convinced one of them has committed murder.

title: Psycho
plot: A Phoenix secretary embezzles $40,000 from her employer's client, goes on the run, and checks into a remote motel run by a young man under the domination of his mother.

title: Léon: The Professional
plot: Mathilda, a 12-year-old girl, is reluctantly taken in by Léon, a professional assassin, after her family is murdered.

title: Star Wars: Episode V - The Empire Strikes Back
plot: After the Rebels are overpowered by the Empire, Luke Skywalker begins his Jedi training with Yoda while his friends are pursued across the galaxy.

title: The Lion King
plot: After the murder of his father, a young lion prince flees his kingdom only to learn the true meaning of responsibility and bravery.

title: Se7en
plot: Two detectives, a rookie and a veteran, hunt a serial killer who uses the seven deadly sins as his modus operandi.

title: The Usual Suspects
plot: A sole survivor tells of the twisty events leading up to a horrific gun battle on a boat, which began when five criminals met at a seemingly random police lineup.

title: WALL-E
plot: In the distant future, a small waste-collecting robot inadvertently embarks on a space journey that will ultimately decide the fate of mankind.

title: No Country for Old Men
plot: Violence and mayhem ensue after a hunter stumbles upon a drug deal gone wrong and more than two million dollars in cash near the Rio Grande.

title: Joker
plot: During the 1980s, a failed stand-up comedian is driven insane and turns to a life of crime and chaos in Gotham City.

title: The Grand Budapest Hotel
plot: A writer encounters the owner of an aging high-class hotel, who tells him of his early years serving as a lobby boy.

title: Alien
plot: After investigating a mysterious transmission, the crew of a commercial spacecraft encounters a deadly lifeform.

title: Blade Runner
plot: A blade runner must pursue and terminate four replicants who stole a ship in space and have returned to Earth to find their creator.

title: Terminator 2: Judgment Day
plot: A cyborg, identical to the one who failed to kill Sarah Connor, must now protect her teenage son from an even more advanced and powerful cyborg.

title: The Shining
plot: A family heads to an isolated hotel for the winter where a sinister presence influences the father into violence.

title: A Clockwork Orange
plot: In the future, a sadistic gang leader is imprisoned and volunteers for a conduct-aversion experiment, but it doesn't go as planned.

title: 2001: A Space Odyssey
plot: After discovering a mysterious artifact buried beneath the Lunar surface, mankind sets off on a quest to find its origins with the help of HAL 9000.

title: Back to the Future
plot: Marty McFly, a 17-year-old high school student, is accidentally sent 30 years into the past in a time-traveling DeLorean.

title: Jurassic Park
plot: A pragmatic paleontologist touring an almost complete theme park is tasked with protecting a couple of kids after a power failure causes the park's cloned dinosaurs to run loose.

title: Mad Max: Fury Road
plot: In a post-apocalyptic wasteland, a woman rebels against a tyrannical ruler in search of her homeland with the aid of a group of female prisoners and a drifter named Max.

title: The Truman Show
plot: An insurance salesman discovers his whole life is actually a reality TV show.

title: Amélie
plot: Amélie is an innocent and naive girl in Paris with her own sense of justice. She decides to help those around her and discovers love.

title: Eternal Sunshine of the Spotless Mind
plot: When their relationship turns sour, a couple undergoes a medical procedure to have each other erased from their memories.

title: Cinema Paradiso
plot: A filmmaker recalls his childhood when falling in love with the pictures at the cinema of his home village and forms a deep friendship with the theater's projectionist.

title: The Pianist
plot: A Polish Jewish musician struggles to survive the destruction of the Warsaw ghetto of World War II.

title: Life is Beautiful
plot: When an open-minded Jewish librarian and his son become victims of the Holocaust, he uses a perfect mixture of will, humor and imagination to protect his son.

title: Once Upon a Time in America
plot: A former Prohibition-era Jewish gangster returns to the Lower East Side of Manhattan over thirty years later, where he once again must confront the ghosts and regrets of his old life.

title: Casablanca
plot: A cynical expatriate American cafe owner struggles to decide whether to help his former lover and her fugitive husband escape the Nazis in French Morocco.

title: Vertigo
plot: A former San Francisco police detective juggles wrestling with his personal demons and becoming obsessed with the hauntingly beautiful woman he has been hired to trail.

title: Taxi Driver
plot: A mentally unstable veteran works as a nighttime taxi driver in New York City, where the perceived decadence and sleaze fuels his urge for violent action.

title: One Flew Over the Cuckoo's Nest
plot: A criminal pleads insanity and is admitted to a mental institution, where he rebels against the oppressive nurse and rallies up the scared patients.

title: The Good, the Bad and the Ugly
plot: A bounty-hunting scam joins two men in an uneasy alliance against a third in a race to find a fortune in gold buried in a remote cemetery.

title: Apocalypse Now
plot: A U.S. Army officer serving in Vietnam is tasked with assassinating a renegade Special Forces Colonel who sees himself as a god.

title: Reservoir Dogs
plot: When a simple jewelry heist goes horribly wrong, the surviving criminals begin to suspect that one of them is a police informant.

title: The Big Lebowski
plot: Jeff 'The Dude' Lebowski, mistaken for a millionaire of the same name, seeks restitution for his ruined rug and enlists his bowling buddies to help get it.

title: North by Northwest
plot: A New York City advertising executive goes on the run after being mistaken for a government agent by a group of foreign spies.

title: Singin' in the Rain
plot: A silent film production company and cast make a difficult transition to sound.

title: The Sound of Music
plot: A woman leaves an Austrian convent to become a governess to the children of a Naval officer widower.

title: Raiders of the Lost Ark
plot: Archaeologist and adventurer Indiana Jones is hired by the U.S. government to find the Ark of the Covenant before the Nazis.

title: Toy Story
plot: A cowboy doll is profoundly threatened and jealous when a new spaceman action figure supplants him as top toy in a boy's bedroom.

title: Finding Nemo
plot: After his son is captured in the Great Barrier Reef and taken to Sydney, a timid clownfish sets out on a journey to bring him home.

title: Inside Out
plot: After young Riley is uprooted from her Midwest life and moved to San Francisco, her emotions - Joy, Fear, Anger, Disgust and Sadness - conflict on how best to navigate a new city.

title: Up
plot: 78-year-old Carl Fredricksen travels to Paradise Falls in his house equipped with balloons, inadvertently taking a young stowaway.

title: Your Name
plot: Two teenagers share a profound, magical connection upon discovering they are swapping bodies. When a comet threatens to destroy everything, they must find each other.

title: Princess Mononoke
plot: On a journey to find the cure for a Tatarigami's curse, Ashitaka finds himself in the middle of a war between the forest gods and a mining colony.

title: Grave of the Fireflies
plot: A young boy and his little sister struggle to survive in Japan during World War II.

title: Catch Me If You Can
plot: Barely 21 yet, Frank is a skilled forger who has passed as a doctor, lawyer and pilot. FBI agent Carl becomes obsessed with tracking him down.

title: Gone Girl
plot: With his wife's disappearance having become the focus of an intense media circus, a man sees the spotlight turned on him when it's suspected that he may not be innocent.

title: Zodiac
plot: In the late 1960s and 1970s, a cartoonist and a reporter pursue the Zodiac Killer, a serial murderer terrorizing the San Francisco Bay Area.

title: Social Network
plot: As Harvard student Mark Zuckerberg creates the social networking site that would become known as Facebook, he is sued by the twins who claimed he stole their idea.

title: There Will Be Blood
plot: A story of family, religion, hatred, oil and madness, focusing on a turn-of-the-century prospector in the early days of the business.

title: The Revenant
plot: A frontiersman on a fur trading expedition in the 1820s fights for survival after being mauled by a bear and left for dead by members of his own hunting team.

title: La La Land
plot: While navigating their careers in Los Angeles, a pianist and an actress fall in love while attempting to reconcile their aspirations for the future.

title: Moonlight
plot: A young African-American man grapples with his identity and sexuality while experiencing the everyday struggles of childhood, adolescence, and burgeoning adulthood.

title: Arrival
plot: A linguist works with the military to communicate with alien lifeforms after twelve mysterious spacecraft appear around the world.

title: Blade Runner 2049
plot: Young Blade Runner K's discovery of a long-buried secret leads him to track down former Blade Runner Rick Deckard, who has been missing for thirty years.

title: Dune
plot: Feature adaptation of Frank Herbert's science fiction novel about the son of a noble family entrusted with the protection of the most valuable asset in the galaxy.

title: Dune: Part Two
plot: Paul Atreides unites with Chani and the Fremen while seeking revenge against the conspirators who destroyed his family.

title: Oppenheimer
plot: The story of American scientist J. Robert Oppenheimer and his role in the development of the atomic bomb.

title: Everything Everywhere All at Once
plot: A middle-aged Chinese immigrant is swept up into an insane adventure in which she alone can save existence by exploring other universes.

title: Top Gun: Maverick
plot: After thirty years, Maverick is still pushing the envelope as a top naval aviator, but must confront ghosts of his past when he leads a group of graduates.

title: John Wick: Chapter 4
plot: John Wick uncovers a path to defeating The High Table. But before he can earn his freedom, Wick must face off against a new enemy with powerful alliances.

title: Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse
plot: Teen Miles Morales becomes the Spider-Man of his universe and must join with five spider-powered individuals from other dimensions to stop a threat for all realities.

title: Avengers: Endgame
plot: After the devastating events of Infinity War, the Avengers assemble once more to reverse Thanos' actions and restore balance to the universe.

title: Avengers: Infinity War
plot: The Avengers and their allies must be willing to sacrifice all in an attempt to defeat the powerful Thanos before his blitz of devastation puts an end to the universe.

title: The Avengers
plot: Earth's mightiest heroes must come together and learn to fight as a team if they are to stop the mischievous Loki and his alien army from enslaving humanity.

title: Guardians of the Galaxy
plot: A group of intergalactic criminals must pull together to stop a fanatical warrior with plans to purge the universe.

title: Black Panther
plot: T'Challa, heir to the hidden but advanced kingdom of Wakanda, must step forward to lead his people into a new future and must confront a challenger from his country's past.

title: Iron Man
plot: After being held captive in an Afghan cave, billionaire engineer Tony Stark creates a unique weaponized suit of armor to fight evil.

title: Thor: Ragnarok
plot: Imprisoned on the planet Sakaar, Thor must race against time to return to Asgard and stop Ragnarök, the destruction of his homeworld.

title: Deadpool
plot: A wisecracking mercenary gets experimented on and becomes immortal yet horribly scarred, and sets out to track down the man who ruined his looks.

title: The Batman
plot: When a sadistic serial killer begins murdering key political figures in Gotham, Batman is forced to investigate the city's hidden corruption.

title: Got Milk?
plot: A young couple navigates the challenges of raising a child in New York City.

title: Knives Out
plot: A detective investigates the death of the patriarch of an eccentric, combative family.

title: Glass Onion
plot: Detective Blanc investigates a murder during a billionaire's getaway on his private Greek island.

title: Get Out
plot: A young African-American visits his white girlfriend's parents for the weekend, where his simmering uneasiness about their reception of him eventually reaches a boiling point.

title: Us
plot: A family's serene beach vacation turns to chaos when their doppelgängers appear and begin to terrorize them.

title: Hereditary
plot: A grieving family is haunted by tragic and disturbing occurrences after the death of their secretive grandmother.

title: The Witch
plot: A family in 1630s New England is torn apart by the forces of witchcraft, black magic, and possession.

title: Midsommar
plot: A couple travels to Northern Europe to visit a rural hometown's fabled Swedish mid-summer festival. What begins as an idyllic retreat quickly devolves into a nightmare.

title: A Quiet Place
plot: In a post-apocalyptic world, a family is forced to live in silence while hiding from monsters with ultra-sensitive hearing.

title: Aliens
plot: Decades after her first encounter, Ellen Ripley returns to the planet LV-424 where she first encountered the Xenomorph.

title: The Exorcist
plot: When a teenage girl is possessed by a mysterious entity, her mother seeks the help of two priests to save her daughter.

title: A Nightmare on Elm Street
plot: In the dreams of his victims, a spectral child murderer known as Freddy Krueger stalks the children of the parents who burned him alive.

title: The Conjuring
plot: Paranormal investigators Ed and Lorraine Warren work to help a family terrorized by a dark presence in their farmhouse.

title: IT
plot: In the summer of 1989, a group of bullied kids band together to destroy a shape-shifting monster, which disguises itself as a clown and preys on the children of Derry.

title: Scream
plot: A year after the murder of her mother, a teenage girl is terrorized by a masked killer who targets her and her friends.

title: Halloween
plot: Fifteen years after murdering his sister on Halloween night 1963, Michael Myers escapes from a mental hospital and returns to the small town of Haddonfield to kill again.

title: When Harry Met Sally...
plot: Harry and Sally have known each other for years, and are very good friends, but they fear sex would ruin the friendship.

title: The Notebook
plot: A poor yet passionate young man falls in love with a rich young woman, giving her a sense of freedom, but they are soon separated because of their social differences.

title: Titanic
plot: A seventeen-year-old aristocrat falls in love with a kind but poor artist aboard the luxurious, ill-fated R.M.S. Titanic.

title: Pretty Woman
plot: A wealthy Los Angeles businessman hires a beautiful escort for social events and accidentally falls in love with her.

title: 10 Things I Hate About You
plot: A pretty, popular teenager can't go out on a date until her ill-tempered older sister does.

title: Notting Hill
plot: The life of a simple bookshop owner changes when he meets the most famous film star in the world.

title: Before Sunrise
plot: A young man and woman meet on a train in Europe, and wind up spending one evening together in Vienna before parting.

title: Before Sunset
plot: Nine years after Jesse and Celine first met, they encounter each other again on the French leg of Jesse's book tour.

title: The Fault in Our Stars
plot: Two teenage cancer patients begin a life-affirming journey to visit a reclusive author in Amsterdam.

title: Love Actually
plot: Follows the lives of eight very different couples in dealing with their love lives in various loosely interrelated tales all set during a frantic month before Christmas in London.

title: Crazy Rich Asians
plot: An American-born Chinese woman travels to Singapore to meet her boyfriend's extremely wealthy family.

title: Superbad
plot: Two co-dependent high school seniors are forced to deal with separation anxiety after their plan to stage a booze-soaked party goes awry.

title: The Hangover
plot: Three buddies wake up from a bachelor party in Las Vegas with no memory of the previous night and the bachelor missing.

title: Bridesmaids
plot: Competition between the maid of honor and a bridesmaid, over who is the bride's best friend, threatens to upend the life of an out-of-work pastry chef.

title: Step Brothers
plot: Two aimless middle-aged losers still living at home are forced against their will to become roommates when their parents marry.

title: Anchorman: The Legend of Ron Burgundy
plot: Ron Burgundy is San Diego's top-rated newsman in the male-dominated broadcasting of the 1970s, but that's all about to change when a new female employee with ambition to burn arrives.

title: The Incredibles
plot: A family of superheroes living a quiet suburban life are forced to use their powers to save the world from a villain.

title: Ratatouille
plot: A rat who can cook makes an unusual alliance with a young kitchen worker at a famous Paris restaurant.

title: Coco
plot: Aspiring musician Miguel, confronted with his family's ancestral ban on music, enters the Land of the Dead to find his great-great-grandfather, a legendary singer.

title: Encanto
plot: A Colombian teenage girl has to face the frustration of being the only member of her family without magical powers.

title: Shrek 2
plot: Shrek and Fiona travel to the Kingdom of Far Far Away to meet Fiona's parents.

title: How to Train Your Dragon
plot: A hapless young Viking who aspires to hunt dragons becomes the unlikely friend of a young dragon himself, and learns there may be more to the creatures than he assumed.

title: The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring
plot: A meek Hobbit from the Shire and eight companions set out on a journey to destroy the powerful One Ring and save Middle-earth from the Dark Lord Sauron.

title: The Lord of the Rings: The Two Towers
plot: While Frodo and Sam edge closer to Mordor with the help of the shifty Gollum, the divided fellowship makes a stand against Sauron's new ally, Saruman.

title: Harry Potter and the Sorcerer's Stone
plot: An orphaned boy enrolls in a school of wizardry, where he learns the truth about himself, his family and the terrible evil that haunts the magical world.

title: Harry Potter and the Deathly Hallows - Part 2
plot: Harry, Ron and Hermione search for Voldemort's remaining Horcruxes in their effort to destroy the Dark Lord.

title: The Chronicles of Narnia: The Lion, the Witch and the Wardrobe
plot: Four children discover the world of Narnia through a magical wardrobe.

title: Pan's Labyrinth
plot: In the Falangist Spain of 1944, the bookish young stepdaughter of a sadistic army officer escapes into an eerie but captivating fantasy world.

title: The Hobbit: An Unexpected Journey
plot: A reluctant Hobbit, Bilbo Baggins, sets out to the Lonely Mountain with a spirited group of dwarves to reclaim their mountain home.

title: Braveheart
plot: Scottish warrior William Wallace leads his people in a rebellion against King Edward I of England.

title: Full Metal Jacket
plot: A pragmatic U.S. Marine observes the dehumanizing effects the Vietnam War has on his fellow recruits from their brutal boot camp training.
Two young British soldiers during the First World War are given an impossible mission: deliver a message deep in enemy territory that will stop their own men from walking into a trap.

title: Dunkirk
plot: Allied soldiers from Belgium, the British Empire, Canada, and France are surrounded by the German army and evacuated during a fierce battle in World War II.

title: Hacksaw Ridge
plot: The true story of Pfc. Desmond T. Doss, who won the Congressional Medal of Honor despite his refusal to bear arms during WWII on religious grounds.

title: Paths of Glory
plot: After refusing to attack an enemy position, a general accuses the soldiers of cowardice and their commanding officer must defend them.

title: Platoon
plot: Chris Taylor, a young, naive recruit in Vietnam, faces a moral crisis when confronted with the horrors of war and the duality of man.

title: The Hurt Locker
plot: During the Iraq War, a Sergeant recently assigned to an army bomb squad is put at odds with his squad mates due to his maverick style of handling his work.

title: March of the Penguins
plot: In the Antarctic, every March since the beginning of time, the weight of millions of penguins journey inland to their breeding grounds.

title: Planet Earth II
plot: David Attenborough returns with a new wildlife documentary that shows life in a variety of habitats.

title: Free Solo
plot: Follow Alex Honnold as he becomes the first person to ever free solo climb Yosemite's 3,000ft high El Capitan wall.

title: Blackfish
plot: A documentary on the captive orca Tilikum, which was involved in the deaths of three people.

title: Jaws
plot: When a killer shark unleashes chaos on a beach community, it's up to a local sheriff, a marine biologist, and an old seafarer to hunt the beast down.

title: The Breakfast Club
plot: Five high school students meet in Saturday detention and discover how they have a lot more in common than they thought.

title: Ferris Bueller's Day Off
plot: A high school slacker pretends to be sick to skip school and has an adventure in Chicago.

title: The Karate Kid
plot: A martial arts master agrees to teach karate to a bullied teenager after they meet on vacation.

title: Rocky
plot: A small-time boxer gets a supremely rare chance to fight the heavy-weight champion in a bout in which he strives to go the distance for his self-respect.

title: Raging Bull
plot: The life of boxer Jake LaMotta, whose violence and temper led him to the top in the ring, yet destroyed his life outside of it.

title: Moneyball
plot: Oakland A's general manager Billy Beane's successful attempt to assemble a baseball team on a lean budget by employing computer-generated analysis.

title: The Wolf of Wall Street
plot: Based on the true story of Jordan Belfort, from his rise to a wealthy stockbroker living the high life to his fall involving crime, corruption and the federal government.

title: The Social Network
plot: As Harvard student Mark Zuckerberg creates the social networking site that would become known as Facebook, he is sued by the twins who claimed he stole their idea.

title: Bohemian Rhapsody
plot: The story of the legendary British rock band Queen and lead singer Freddie Mercury, leading up to their famous performance at Live Aid in 1985.

title: The King's Speech
plot: The story of King George VI, his impromptu ascension to the throne of the British Empire in 1936, and the speech therapist who helped the unsure monarch overcome his stammer.

title: A Beautiful Mind
plot: After a brilliant but asocial mathematician accepts secret work in cryptography, his life takes a turn for the nightmarish.

title: 12 Years a Slave
plot: In the antebellum United States, Solomon Northup, a free black man from upstate New York, is abducted and sold into slavery.

title: The Imitation Game
plot: During World War II, the English mathematical genius Alan Turing tries to crack the German enigma code with help from fellow mathematicians.

title: Lincoln
plot: As the American Civil War continues to rage, America's president struggles with continuing carnage on the battlefield as he fights with many inside his own cabinet on the decision to emancipate the slaves.

title: Jobs
plot: The story of Steve Jobs' ascension from college dropout into one of the most revered creative entrepreneurs of the 20th century.

title: Dirty Dancing
plot: Spending the summer at a Catskills resort with her family, Frances 'Baby' Houseman falls in love with the camp's dance instructor, Johnny Castle.

title: Grease
plot: Good girl Sandy and greaser Danny fell in love over the summer. When they unexpectedly discover they're now in the same high school, will they be able to rekindle their romance?

title: Chicago
plot: Two death-row murderesses develop a fierce rivalry while competing for publicity, celebrity, and a slick lawyer's attention.

title: Les Misérables
plot: In 19th-century France, Jean Valjean, who for decades has been hunted by the ruthless policeman Javert after breaking parole, agrees to care for a factory worker's daughter.

title: The Greatest Showman
plot: Celebrates the birth of show business and tells of a visionary who rose from nothing to create a spectacle that became a worldwide sensation.

title: Mamma Mia!
plot: The story of a bride-to-be trying to find her real father told using hit songs by the popular 1970s group ABBA.

title: In the Mood for Love
plot: Two neighbors form a strong bond after both suspect extramarital activities of their spouses. However, they agree to keep their bond platonic.

title: Oldboy
plot: After being kidnapped and imprisoned for fifteen years, Oh Dae-Su is released, only to find that he must find his captor in five days.

title: Memories of Murder
plot: In a small Korean province in 1986, two detectives struggle with the case of multiple young women being found raped and murdered.

title: The Handmaiden
plot: A woman is hired as a handmaiden to a Japanese heiress, but secretly she is involved in a plot to defraud her.

title: Amelie
plot: Amélie is an innocent and naive girl in Paris with her own sense of justice. She decides to help those around her and discovers love along the way.

title: The Lives of Others
plot: In 1984 East Berlin, an agent of the secret police, conducting surveillance on a writer and his lover, finds himself becoming increasingly absorbed by their lives.

title: Metropolis
plot: In a futuristic city sharply divided between the working class and the city planners, the son of the city's mastermind falls in love with a working class prophet.

title: M
plot: When the police in a German city are unable to catch a child-murderer, other criminals join in the manhunt.

title: The Third Man
plot: Pulp novelist Holly Martins travels to shadowy, postwar Vienna, only to find himself investigating the mysterious death of an old friend, Harry Lime.

title: Sunset Boulevard
plot: A screenwriter is hired to rework a faded silent film star's script, only to find himself developing a dangerous relationship.

title: Dr. Strangelove
plot: An insane general triggers a path to nuclear holocaust that a War Room full of politicians and generals frantically try to stop.

title: The Great Dictator
plot: Dictator Adenoid Hynkel tries to expand his empire while a poor Jewish barber tries to avoid persecution from Hynkel's regime.

title: Modern Times
plot: The Tramp struggles to live in modern industrial society with the help of a young homeless woman.

title: Bicycle Thieves
plot: In post-war Rome, a working-class father's desperate search for his stolen bicycle, which he needs to be able to work.

title: 8½
plot: A harassed film director retreats into his memories and fantasies to escape his domestic and professional problems.

title: The Seventh Seal
plot: A knight plays chess with Death during the Black Plague to buy time for his people.

title: L'Avventura
plot: A woman disappears during a boating trip with friends. Her lover and her best friend search for her, and their journey leads to profound emotional revelations.

title: Barry Lyndon
plot: An Irish rogue wins the heart of a rich widow and assumes her dead husband's aristocratic position in 18th-century England.

title: The Conformist
plot: A weak-willed Italian man becomes a fascist flunky who goes abroad to arrange the assassination of his old teacher, now a political dissident.

title: Stalker
plot: A guide leads two men through an area known as the Zone to find a room that grants wishes.

title: Solaris
plot: A psychologist is sent to a space station orbiting the oceanic planet Solaris to investigate the death of a doctor and the mental breakdowns of other cosmonauts.

title: Come and See
plot: A young boy is swept up in the horrors of World War II in Belarus as the Nazis invade.

title: Tinker Tailor Soldier Spy
plot: In the bleak days of the Cold War, espionage veteran George Smiley is recalled from retirement when there are signs that one of the senior figures in British Intelligence is a Soviet mole.

title: Nocturnal Animals
plot: A wealthy art gallery owner receives a draft manuscript for a violent thriller novel from her ex-husband, which leads her to re-examine their relationship.

title: Prisoners
plot: When Keller Dover's daughter and her friend go missing, he takes matters into his own hands as the police pursue multiple leads and the pressure mounts.

title: Incendies
plot: Twins journey to the Middle East to discover their family history and fulfill their mother's final wishes.

title: Sicario
plot: An idealistic FBI agent is enlisted by a government task force to aid in the escalating war against drugs at the border area between the U.S. and Mexico.

title: Chinatown
plot: A private detective hired to expose an adulterer finds himself caught up in a web of deceit, corruption, and murder.

title: Snatch
plot: Unscrupulous boxing promoters, violent bookmakers, a Russian gangster, incompetent amateur robbers and supposedly Jewish jewelers fight to track down a priceless stolen diamond.

title: Lock, Stock and Two Smoking Barrels
plot: A botched card game in London triggers four friends, thugs, weed-growers, hard gangsters, loan sharks and debt collectors to collide with each other.

title: Pain and Glory
plot: A film director reflects on the choices he's made in life as past and present come crashing down around him.

title: Portrait of a Lady on Fire
plot: On an isolated island in Brittany at the end of the eighteenth century, a female painter is obliged to paint a wedding portrait of a young woman.

title: The Favourite
plot: In early 18th century England, a frail Queen Anne occupies the throne and her close friend, Lady Sarah, governs the country in her stead.

title: Poor Things
plot: The incredible tale about the fantastical evolution of Bella Baxter, a young woman brought back to life by the brilliant and unorthodox scientist Dr. Godwin Baxter.

title: Kill Bill: Vol. 1
plot: After awakening from a four-year coma, a former assassin wreaks vengeance on the team of assassins who betrayed her.

title: Kill Bill: Vol. 2
plot: The Bride continues her quest of vengeance against her former boss and lover Bill, the reclusive bouncer Budd and the treacherous, one-eyed Elle Driver.

title: The Sixth Sense
plot: A boy who communicates with spirits seeks the help of a disheartened child psychologist.

title: Unbreakable
plot: A man learns something extraordinary about himself after a devastating accident.

title: Signs
plot: A family living on a farm finds mysterious crop circles in their fields which suggests something more frightening to come.

title: Split
plot: Three girls are kidnapped by a man with a diagnosed 23 distinct personalities. They must try to escape before the apparent emergence of a frightful new 24th.
